rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) bears no relation to Educ. Code §30.028, which governs leasing of property by the Texas School for the Blind and Visually Impaired for a day-care center.
quote: The Texas School for the Blind and Visually Impaired may lease available building space on the school's campus located at 1100 West 45th Street, Austin, Travis County, to a private provider to provide a day-care center for children of the school's employees, other state employees, and private customers.
_note: No nexus between proposed change and this rule; rule concerns property leasing for a day-care center, not property tax exemptions.
